components.value: V, S, M (a glass or metal marble and a twisted loop of parchment )

description.value: This spell functions as mirror hideaway, except any creature that enters the target mirror can spend a swift action to exit through another mirror within 500 feet as if using dimension door; this is a one-way transport. The creature can exit through a mirror only if it could fit through an opening the same size as the mirror. Each transport through the target mirror reduces the spell’s duration by 1 hour.
